body.purpose: Standard task details, info, and inputs.

shadows.name: control-shadow
shadows.purpose: Standard subtle shadow for buttons and inputs.

shadows.name: elevated-hover
shadows.purpose: Dynamic shadow applied during card hover events to simulate elevation.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action trigger for adding tasks and executing major operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #6366f1; color: #f1f5f9; padding: 10px 20px; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 12px; transition: background-color 0.2s, transform 0.1s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #a855f7; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Task Card
components.description: Container representing an individual task, displaying title and status.
components.html:
Create Implementation Plan

Draft the initial PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md files.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #1e293b; padding: 24px; border-radius: 16px; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #334155; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-card-title { color: #f1f5f9; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card-desc { color: #94a3b8; margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; }

narrative.overview: The Focused Console is a dark, low-distraction HUD environment with precise controls and typography. It is engineered specifically for tech-focused professionals and developers who require a workspace that fosters flow state and expert control.
keyCharacteristics: Dark HUD styling with a deep canvas background (slate-950).
Pure high-contrast typography and subtle dividers to define structure.
High utility with tactile and confident interaction states.
Calm and purposeful motion with clean fade/slide transitions.

rules.name: The Rarity Accent Rule
rules.body: Indigo and Purple accents are used sparingly (≤10% of total surface area). Their rarity is the point—ensuring that primary CTAs and active states command immediate attention.

rules.name: The Resting Flat Rule
rules.body: Elements rest flat on the Console Surface at z-index 0. Shadows and glow effects are only triggered dynamically by hover, focus, or overlay states.

dos: Do maintain a strict contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for body and placeholder texts against their backgrounds.
Do use native dialog tags and absolute positioning to prevent element clipping in overflow contexts.
Do align components to a consistent 8px/16px/24px spacing grid.
donts: Don't use colored left/right side-stripe borders as highlights on cards or task elements.
Don't apply text gradients or gradient-to-transparent text masking.
Don't animate image scale or rotate transformations on hover.
Don't use cream, beige, paper, or ivory background tones.
